claim: No Stable, large-data performance, release, package-parity, or recorded manual assistive-technology claim is made.

semantics.nativeBasis: A named ordered list preserves item order while native buttons expose pointer, touch, speech, switch, and keyboard alternatives.
semantics.drag: Native pointer drag is additive; every move remains available through visible Move Up/Down controls and optional destination controls.

keyboard.behavior: Moves through each native handle, move action, and optional destination control.
Picks up the focused handle; a second activation drops at the current position.
Moves a picked item one logical position and preserves visible focus.
Cancels keyboard movement and restores the complete original order.

enhancementIsolation.destinationFalse: No destination select, label, option, or destination callback reason exists.
enhancementIsolation.announcementsFalse: No live region or announcement state update exists.
enhancementIsolation.undoFalse: No snapshots, Undo control, undo callback reason, or undo announcement exists.
enhancementIsolation.virtualFalse: Every item renders; no spacers, range button, or window callback exists.

preferences.forcedColors: Rows, grabbed state, buttons, selects, and focus use system colors.
preferences.reducedMotion: Movement scrolls with behavior auto and state transitions become immediate.
preferences.rtl: Logical layout mirrors while ordered vertical movement remains stable.

limitations: Source-present-unreleased evidence does not yet include generated parity, packed consumers, large-data performance, or manual assistive-technology sessions.
Consumers own persistence, authorization, cross-list movement, and server conflict recovery.
